name: orch-stubs
description: Performance and scaling stubs owned by Orchestration

scripts.build: (trap 'kill 0' INT; npm run build:auth & npm run build:ipv & npm run build:spot & npm run build:ais & wait)
scripts.start:local:ais: sam local start-api --template build/ais/template.yaml --env-vars parameters.json -p 3002 --parameter-overrides Environment=dev
scripts.start:local:auth: sam local start-api --template build/auth/template.yaml --env-vars parameters.json -p 3001 --parameter-overrides Environment=dev
scripts.start:local:ipv: sam local start-api --template build/ipv/template.yaml --env-vars parameters.json -p 3000 --parameter-overrides Environment=dev
scripts.check: npm run check:lint && npm run check:prettier
scripts.fix: npm run fix:lint && npm run fix:prettier
scripts.test:localstack:integration: npm run localstack:up && (vitest run --config=./vitest.integration.config.ts && e=0) || e=1 && npm run localstack:down && exit $e
scripts.test:ci: tsc --noEmit && npm run localstack:up && (vitest run --passWithNoTests --config=./vitest.ci.config.ts && e=0) || e=1 && npm run localstack:down && exit $e
